heading: PROJECTS
description: Welcome to Anwesha's Portfolio, where the real project is engineering a digital world that feels a intuitive as nature itself. Click on the project titles to see what she's been building, and remember: In the world of code, every bug is just a feature waiting to be discovered!

projects.name: terminal-ascii
projects.description: An Experimental Approach to Define and Display Media Files like Images and Videos as its Equivalent ANSI representation inside OS Terminal

projects.name: Image_Compression
